articles.author: Aamer Madhani, Matthew Lee
articles.title: Trump criticizes European allies for not helping fix the damage his war against Iran has caused - AP News
articles.description: President Donald Trump entered his war of choice against Iran without consulting global allies. But as he weighs an exit from the conflict, he’s making it clear that he’s expecting the world to help him fix the unintended damage it’s caused. On Tuesday, he bl…
